findings.issue_identified: Self-referential routing table routes 3/4 operations to itself (infinite loop)
findings.root_cause: Router claimed to dispatch to specialist skills that do not exist
findings.solution: Converted from broken router to monolithic implementation guide

modifications.frontmatter: Added parent: use-hivemind, replaced routing table dump with concise one-sentence description

modifications.bundled_resources: Added complete Bundled Resources table (12 references + 6 templates + 2 tests)
modifications.routing_replaced: Removed routing table, replaced with Implementation Operations section describing actual behavior
modifications.independence_rules: Changed from 'ROUTER ONLY' to 'IMPLEMENTATION SKILL (not a router)'

evidence.self_referential_routing: NONE - verified with grep for 'Route To|dispatch' returns no matches
evidence.use_hivemind_git_memory_appearances: Only in header (line 2), H1 (line 7), dependency chain (line 163)
